title: Match data search from CSV files
evidence: src/data.ts:87-125 loads Brasileirao, Copa do Brasil, Libertadores, and extended match statistics from CSV

title: Player data search capability
evidence: src/data.ts:150+ loads FIFA player data; find_players tool in index.ts:86-98

title: Calculate team statistics (wins/losses/goals)
evidence: src/queries.ts:49-101 teamStats function with full win/draw/loss tracking; test passes at line 56-61

title: Team head-to-head comparison
evidence: src/queries.ts:115-142 headToHead function; test passes at line 63-67

title: Team name normalization (handles variations)
evidence: src/data.ts:32-55 normalizeTeam strips -SP suffix and accents via Unicode normalization; teamMatches does fuzzy matching

title: Properly formatted JSON responses
evidence: src/index.ts:164-166 returns JSON.stringify(result) for all tools

title: Performance: simple lookups < 2 seconds
evidence: test/queries.test.ts shows individual query tests (findMatches) complete in 55-80ms, well under 2s. However spec requires real performance measurement under load, not just unit test timing
suggestion: Add performance/load tests with realistic data volumes and concurrent requests

title: Performance: aggregate queries < 5 seconds
evidence: Unit tests show standings and stats compute in 4-79ms. Real end-to-end MCP server latency under load not tested
suggestion: Add integration tests measuring server response time over MCP transport

title: No timeout errors
evidence: Tests pass without timeout, but no test explicitly exercises timeout boundaries or resource exhaustion
suggestion: Add stress tests with large queries

title: All 6 CSV files loadable and queryable
evidence: src/data.ts loads Brasileirao, Copa do Brasil, Libertadores, extended stats, and historical Brasileirão (5 files). TASK.md lists 6 but code only implements 5
suggestion: Verify if FIFA player file counts as the 6th; if not, add the missing 6th file

title: At least 20 sample questions answerable
evidence: No test harness exercises a variety of natural language queries. Unit tests cover 12 specific query functions but do not demonstrate end-to-end capability for 20 distinct question types
suggestion: Add comprehensive test cases covering all documented example questions from TASK.md

title: Cross-file queries (player + match data)
evidence: No test combines player and match data queries. findPlayers and findMatches are tested independently but not integrated
suggestion: Add test case like 'find players from Flamengo who played in 2023 matches'

title: Build succeeds
evidence: npm run build completed with exit code 0, TypeScript compilation successful

title: No lint script defined
suggestion: Add ESLint or similar linting to package.json scripts for code quality checks
